component.name: Ermis
component.summary: Hide content in images or audio

description.p: Ermis is a cross-platform steganography application that allows you to hide and extract secret data within digital media files. Named after the Greek god of messages and communication, Ermis enables covert communication through innocent-looking image and audio files.

ul.li: Hide data in PNG, JPG, and BMP images using LSB (Least Significant Bit) techniques
Live preview of original and modified images with side-by-side comparison
PRT Artistic Mode: Specialized visual steganography for camera-scannable codes
Real-time capacity indicator showing available hiding space
Support for WAV, MP3, FLAC, and OGG audio files
Automatic conversion of non-WAV files using FFmpeg
Built-in audio player with play/pause/stop and volume controls
Metadata extraction for accurate capacity calculation
Text input for hiding plain messages with UTF-8 encoding
File input for hiding any file type with filename preservation
Smart marker system (0x00 for text, length byte for files)
Automatic detection of data type during extraction
Optional AES encryption with passphrase protection
ENCR marker for automatic encrypted data detection
Passphrase memory during current session
Secure extraction with decryption prompts
Dual-tab interface for hiding and extracting data
Drag and drop support for both images and audio files
Clipboard integration for one-click text copying
Image preview highlighting with file path display
Camera integration for scanning PRT artistic codes
Image steganography for PNG, JPG, BMP formats
Audio steganography with FFmpeg conversion
Text and file input with filename preservation
AES encryption with passphrase protection
PRT Artistic Mode with camera scanning
Drag and drop support for all file types
Live capacity indicator and preview panels
Built-in audio player with playback controls
Cross-platform support (Linux, Windows, macOS)
